title: L3: Canvas Enrollment for Lifelong Learners
body: Overview of the L3 Process Canvas may be used by any UW-Madison program; no special agreement is required regardless of what type of credential/credit your program offers or does not offer. See Canvas - FAQs for Noncredit Courses [UW-Madison] . Each registrant will be invited immediately to a fully automated process running 24/7/365 which: Either issues the learner a UW-Madison NetID or verifies that the learner's existing NetID is ready to be used. Adds this learner to the appropriate course-site roster(s) in the campus LMS. Directs the learner to the campus LMS to begin accessing the course website(s). For details about the learner's experience of this process please see: Lifelong Learners (L3) - Enrollment Process . For more information To request more information about CSIS & L3, fill out the CSIS-L3 Request More Information Form . Additional information: CSIS Overview Using CSIS to Register Students in Your Canvas Course
